zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Berwick於1380年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾比阿康斯費爾德時，她的父親Sir Hugh Berwick20歲，母親Margaret Lowell15歲。她於1407年與Sir Ralph Boteler在英國格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1427年12月在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Berwick于1380年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾比阿康斯費爾德时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Berwick20岁，母亲Margaret Lowell15岁。她于1407年与Sir Ralph Boteler在英国格盧斯特斯爾巴德敏頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1427年12月在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Berwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name primarily from Berwick-on-Tweed, on the Northumbrian coast at the mouth of the Tweed river, a border town that regularly changed hands between the Scots and the English. Also from any of the places called Berwick in Dorset and elsewhere, Berrick in Oxfordshire, Barwick in Norfolk and Yorkshire, or Barricks in High Easter, Essex. This could also be a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) outlying grange’, from Middle English ber(e)wik ‘outlying grange or farm, demesne farm’ (Old English berewīc ‘barley farm’).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Berwick was born in 1380, in Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hugh Berwick, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Lowell, was 15. She married Sir Ralph Boteler in 1407, in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in December 1427, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Berwick est née en 1380, à Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Berwick, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Lowell, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Boteler en 1407, à Badminton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en décembre 1427, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Berwick 1380 in Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Berwick 20 und ihre Mutter Margaret Lowell 15. Sie hat 1407 in Badminton, Gloucestershire, England Sir Ralph Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb im Dezember 1427 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Berwick è nata il nel 1380 nel Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Hugh Berwick, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margaret Lowell, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Boteler nel 1407, nel Badminton, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel dicembre 1427, nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Berwickが1380年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアビーコンスフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Berwickは20歳，母Margaret Lowellは15歳であった。1407年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバドミントンでSir Ralph Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1427年12月にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Berwick(이)가 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 브이콘스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Berwick(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Lowell(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1407년 영국 그루스스터실르 바드민턴에서 Sir Ralph Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Berwick nasceu em 1380, em Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hugh Berwick, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Lowell, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Boteler em 1407, em Badminton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1427, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Berwick родилась в 1380 г. в местности бикунсфиелд, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Berwick было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lowell, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Boteler в 1407 г. в местности бадминтон, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла декабрь 1427 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Berwick nació en 1380, en Beaconsfield, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Hugh Berwick, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Lowell, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir Ralph Boteler en 1407, en Badminton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en diciembre de 1427, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
